conventions.testing: Unit tests in *_tests.rs files, integration tests in tests/
conventions.error_handling: thiserror for libraries, anyhow for applications

patterns: Pattern matching via regex in security scanner
constraints: Must maintain iOS compatibility through FFI
Security scanning must work in CI pipeline
test_coverage: Limited direct tests for security scanning (53% coverage per codecov), mainly integration tests

library_findings.notes: Supports Rust bindings, used in similar security tools

approaches.name: Incremental AST Scanner
approaches.description: Add tree-sitter as optional dependency, create ASTVisitor trait

approaches.name: Full AST Migration
approaches.description: Replace regex patterns with dedicated AST walker

recommendation: Incremental AST Scanner, as it allows validation while maintaining stability
